description: Classical theories, analytical and numerical modeling of various kinetic processes in materials. Including but not limited to transport, grain growth, phase separation, solidification, precipitation, chemical reactions, and multiphysics problems involving electrical, optical, mechanical, and magnetic properties of materials.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (MATH 319,320, or376) and (M S & E 350,351, orCBE 440), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
